snippets.description:
BatchDeleteVersions deletes multiple versions across a repository. The returned operation will
complete once the versions have been deleted.
snippets.title: artifactregistry BatchDeleteVersions Sample

snippets.description:
CreateAttachment creates an attachment. The returned Operation will finish once the
attachment has been created. Its response will be the created attachment.
snippets.title: artifactregistry CreateAttachment Sample

snippets.description:
CreateRepository creates a repository. The returned Operation will finish once the
repository has been created. Its response will be the created Repository.
snippets.title: artifactregistry CreateRepository Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteAttachment deletes an attachment. The returned Operation will
finish once the attachments has been deleted. It will not have any
Operation metadata and will return a `google.protobuf.Empty` response.
snippets.title: artifactregistry DeleteAttachment Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteFile deletes a file and all of its content. It is only allowed on generic
repositories. The returned operation will complete once the file has been
deleted.
snippets.title: artifactregistry DeleteFile Sample

snippets.description:
DeletePackage deletes a package and all of its versions and tags. The returned operation
will complete once the package has been deleted.
snippets.title: artifactregistry DeletePackage Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteRepository deletes a repository and all of its contents. The returned Operation will
finish once the repository has been deleted. It will not have any Operation
metadata and will return a google.protobuf.Empty response.
snippets.title: artifactregistry DeleteRepository Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteVersion deletes a version and all of its content. The returned operation will
complete once the version has been deleted.
snippets.title: artifactregistry DeleteVersion Sample

snippets.description: ExportArtifact exports an artifact to a Cloud Storage bucket.
snippets.title: artifactregistry ExportArtifact Sample

snippets.description: GetIamPolicy gets the IAM policy for a given resource.
snippets.title: artifactregistry GetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description: GetLocation gets information about a location.
snippets.title: artifactregistry GetLocation Sample

snippets.description: GetOperation is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: artifactregistry GetOperation Sample

snippets.description: GetProjectSettings retrieves the Settings for the Project.
snippets.title: artifactregistry GetProjectSettings Sample

snippets.description: GetVPCSCConfig retrieves the VPCSC Config for the Project.
snippets.title: artifactregistry GetVPCSCConfig Sample

snippets.description:
ImportAptArtifacts imports Apt artifacts. The returned Operation will complete once the
resources are imported. Package, Version, and File resources are created
based on the imported artifacts. Imported artifacts that conflict with
existing resources are ignored.
snippets.title: artifactregistry ImportAptArtifacts Sample

snippets.description:
ImportYumArtifacts imports Yum (RPM) artifacts. The returned Operation will complete once the
resources are imported. Package, Version, and File resources are created
based on the imported artifacts. Imported artifacts that conflict with
existing resources are ignored.
snippets.title: artifactregistry ImportYumArtifacts Sample

snippets.description:
ListLocations lists information about the supported locations for this service.
This method can be called in two ways: 

*   **List all public locations: ** Use the path `GET /v1/locations`.
*   **List project-visible locations: ** Use the path
`GET /v1/projects/{project_id}/locations`. This may include public
locations as well as private or other locations specifically visible
to the project.
snippets.title: artifactregistry ListLocations Sample

snippets.description: SetIamPolicy updates the IAM policy for a given resource.
snippets.title: artifactregistry SetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description: TestIamPermissions tests if the caller has a list of permissions on a resource.
snippets.title: artifactregistry TestIamPermissions Sample

snippets.description: UpdateProjectSettings updates the Settings for the Project.
snippets.title: artifactregistry UpdateProjectSettings Sample

snippets.description: UpdateVPCSCConfig updates the VPCSC Config for the Project.
snippets.title: artifactregistry UpdateVPCSCConfig Sample
